meta.title: SAP MCP Servers (Open Source, GitHub)
notes: Only non-fork repositories are included in generated output.
Type labels are restricted to SAP and Community SAP.

entries.name: CAP MCP Server
entries.purpose: AI-assisted CAP development with CDS-aware context.

entries.name: SAP Fiori MCP Server
entries.purpose: Fiori app generation and modification workflows.
entries.notes: MCP package inside SAP Open UX Tools monorepo.

entries.name: UI5 MCP Server
entries.purpose: UI5-aware development support for OpenUI5 and SAPUI5.

entries.name: SAP MDK MCP Server
entries.purpose: AI-assisted SAP Mobile Development Kit workflows.

entries.name: MCP SAP Docs (Upstream)
entries.purpose: Unified SAP developer docs search over curated sources.
entries.notes: Upstream source for SAP docs and ABAP variants.

entries.name: ABAP MCP Server (Downstream Variant)
entries.purpose: ABAP-focused doc and knowledge variant.

entries.name: SAP Notes MCP Server
entries.purpose: Search and retrieve SAP Notes and KB content.

entries.name: SAP BTP Docs MCP
entries.purpose: Semantic search across SAP BTP documentation.

entries.name: SAP AI Core Docs MCP
entries.purpose: Semantic search across SAP AI Core docs.

entries.name: ABAP MCP Server SDK
entries.purpose: Build MCP servers directly in ABAP.
entries.notes: SDK/framework (not a ready-to-run business server by itself).

entries.name: mcp-abap-adt
entries.purpose: ABAP ADT MCP server with CRUD and cloud/on-prem support.
entries.notes: Supports stdio, HTTP and SSE transports.

entries.name: ABAP MCP Server (chandrashekhar-mahajan)
entries.purpose: ABAP ADT REST based MCP tooling for development operations.
entries.notes: Community implementation with multiple auth options.

entries.name: erpl-adt
entries.purpose: CLI plus MCP exposure for ABAP ADT operations.

entries.name: MCP ABAP ADT Server
entries.purpose: ABAP system interaction via ADT APIs.
entries.notes: Early ABAP ADT MCP bridge project.

entries.name: MCP ABAP (abap-adt-api wrapper)
entries.purpose: ABAP operations through wrapped ADT API layer.

entries.name: ABAP ADT MCP Server (buettnerjulian)
entries.purpose: ABAP ADT MCP with object, metadata and analysis tools.

entries.name: mcp-abap-adt (workskong)
entries.purpose: Lightweight ADT adapter for ABAP metadata and source.

entries.name: Vibing Steampunk
entries.purpose: ADT-to-MCP bridge for ABAP and AMDP workflows.
entries.notes: ABAP coding and repo navigation focus.

entries.name: ABAP Accelerator MCP Server
entries.purpose: ABAP development assistant tools via MCP.
entries.notes: AWS solution sample for Amazon Q workflows.

entries.name: MCP ABAP (Validation + Metadata)
entries.purpose: ABAP validation and metadata tool surface.

entries.name: ABAPDocMCP
entries.purpose: Generate WRICEF technical specs from transport content.

entries.name: MCP Integration Suite
entries.purpose: General SAP Integration Suite/CPI operations.

entries.name: MCP Trading Partner Management
entries.purpose: SAP Integration Suite TPM workflows.

entries.name: CPI MCP Server
entries.purpose: SAP Cloud Integration operations via MCP.

entries.name: OData MCP Proxy
entries.purpose: BTP destination-driven proxy from OData/REST to MCP.
entries.notes: Integration Suite/OData admin API bridging pattern.

entries.name: SAP Datasphere MCP (MarioDeFelipe)
entries.purpose: Feature-rich Datasphere API interaction via MCP.

entries.name: SAP Datasphere MCP (rahulsethi)
entries.purpose: Datasphere read-only and analytics operations via MCP.

entries.name: SAP Business Data Cloud MCP
entries.purpose: MCP tooling for SAP Business Data Cloud workflows.
entries.notes: Read-only and contract-first focus in current scope.

categories.title: SAP OData Gateway Graph MCP Server

entries.name: SAP OData to MCP Server for BTP
entries.purpose: Expose SAP OData services as MCP tools.

entries.name: SAP OData to MCP Server (On-Prem)
entries.purpose: On-prem adaptation of OData-to-MCP model.

entries.name: SAP OData MCP Server (TypeScript)
entries.purpose: TypeScript OData MCP implementation.

entries.name: SAP OData MCP Server (Python)
entries.purpose: Python OData MCP implementation.

entries.name: SAP MCP Gateway Server
entries.purpose: SAP Gateway/OData interaction via MCP.

entries.name: SAP Graph API Sandbox MCP
entries.purpose: MCP wrapper for SAP Graph sandbox scenarios.

entries.name: OData MCP Wrapper (Python)
entries.purpose: Bridge OData v2 services into MCP tools.
entries.notes: Dynamic tool generation from OData metadata.

entries.name: OData MCP Bridge (Go)
entries.purpose: Go OData-to-MCP bridge with v2/v4 support.
entries.notes: Includes universal tool mode for large SAP OData services.

entries.name: MCP SAP GUI Server
entries.purpose: Coordinate and input automation for SAP GUI.

entries.name: sap_gui_mcp
entries.purpose: SAP GUI Scripting API exposed via FastMCP.
entries.notes: Windows and SAP GUI scripting setup required.

entries.name: SAPient MCP
entries.purpose: RoboSAPiens-based SAP GUI automation server.
entries.notes: Focused on intelligent SAP GUI automation.

entries.name: HANA MCP Server
entries.purpose: MCP integration for SAP HANA and HANA Cloud.

skills.name: SAP Skills for Claude Code
skills.purpose: Large SAP skill set for Claude Code across CAP, Fiori, ABAP and BTP.
skills.notes: Most visible SAP skill marketplace style repository.

skills.name: SAP Claude Skills
skills.purpose: SAP add-on development skill bundles for Claude workflows.
skills.notes: Repository and docs are primarily Japanese.

skills.name: SAP Skills Power for Kiro
skills.purpose: SAP development skill pack for Kiro IDE.

skills.name: SAP Power for Kiro
skills.purpose: SAP development knowledge package for Kiro IDE.
skills.notes: Similar scope to sap-skills-power, check overlap before adoption.

skills.name: SAP OData Explorer Skill
skills.purpose: Claude skill for SAP OData endpoint exploration.
skills.notes: Skill-style tooling, not an MCP server.

adjacentTools.notes: Community plugin, not an SAP-delivered MCP server.

adjacentTools.notes: Community project, not an SAP-delivered MCP server.

adjacentTools.name: SAP SuccessFactors MCP Server
adjacentTools.purpose: SuccessFactors HR operations via MCP tools.
adjacentTools.notes: Community project, not an SAP-delivered MCP server.

adjacentTools.name: ABAP Remote Filesystem for VS Code
adjacentTools.purpose: Remote ABAP filesystem access in VS Code.
adjacentTools.notes: Useful companion to ABAP MCP workflows.

adjacentTools.name: GitHub Copilot for Eclipse
adjacentTools.purpose: GitHub Copilot integration plugin for Eclipse IDE.

adjacentTools.name: GitHub Copilot in Eclipse (Official Docs)
adjacentTools.purpose: Official setup and usage docs for Copilot in Eclipse.
adjacentTools.notes: Documentation reference, not a GitHub repository.

adjacentTools.notes: Documentation reference, not a GitHub repository.

adjacentTools.name: SAP Build Code and Joule (Official Topic Page)
adjacentTools.purpose: Entry point for SAP Build Code and Joule-related resources.
adjacentTools.notes: Official SAP topic page, not a single repository.

adjacentTools.notes: Reference project, not a generic MCP server.
